subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that there is no God but Him, Who hath ever been sanctified beyond the mention of all created things, and will forever remain thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن ذکر الموجودات و لا یزال یکون بمثل ما
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
